§6Juicer§f

§aExtract juices, make smoothies, milkshakes, butters, and condiments.§f

The §bJuicer§f is the most versatile cooking utensil in HarvestCraft. It produces all fruit juices (§e26+ types§f), smoothies, milkshakes, nut butters, and many condiments and specialty drinks.

§6Crafting§f:
§eShapeless recipe:§f
§b• 1× Stone§f
§b• 1× Pressure Plate§f

§6Recipe Categories§f:
§b• Juices§f (§e2 fruit per juice§f): Apple, Carrot, Blackberry, Raspberry, Blueberry, Cactus Fruit, Cherry, Cranberry, Grape, Kiwi, Lime, Mango, Plum, Pear, Apricot, Fig, Grapefruit, Persimmon, Orange, Papaya, Peach, Pomegranate, Starfruit, Strawberry.
§b• Smoothies§f (fruit + snowball): Strawberry, Blueberry, Melon, Lemon, Papaya, Starfruit, Banana, Coconut, Mango, Pomegranate, Kiwi, Apple, Cranberry, Grape, Plum, Pear, Blackberry, Raspberry.
§b• Milkshakes§f: Strawberry, Chocolate, Banana, Raspberry.
§b• Nut Butters§f: Almond Butter, Cashew Butter, Chestnut Butter, Peanut Butter, Pistachio Butter.
§b• Condiments§f: Mayo, Ketchup, Mustard, Soy Sauce, Vinegar, BBQ Sauce, Salsa, Hot Sauce.
§b• Specialty§f: Cooking Oil, Sesame Oil, Egg Nog, Fruit Punch, Hot Chocolate, Pina Colada, Bubbly Water, Lemonade, Energy Drink.

§6Usage§f:
§9Place the Juicer§f in a crafting grid with the recipe's ingredients. The Juicer is reusable and does not get consumed. Most juice recipes yield §e2 juice§f per §e2 fruit§f input.

§eTip§f: The Juicer pairs with a fruit tree farm for juice production and a §bPresser§f for cooking oil. Set up a juicer early — juices are a reliable food source and many are used in downstream recipes (smoothies, sodas, cocktails).
